settings.name: NYXLITE

settings.name: ZENCOT
settings.heading: ZENCOT: Performance and Sustainability in Perfect Harmony
settings.description: ZENCOT is a premium blend of BCI-certified cotton and elastane, delivering all-day comfort, breathability and performance.
settings.performance:
FluidMotion 4-way stretch for full mobility
ZO-Fresh anti-odour treatment for extended freshness
Retains shape and softness through repeated use
settings.sustainability:
Treated with COzTERRA to help absorb CO2 during washing
Each piece removes 16-41g of CO2 over its lifetime
Supports reduced carbon footprint without compromising performance
settings.community: Designed for athletes who expect more from their gear, with a blend of sustainability, comfort and everyday performance.

settings.name: ZOENIX
settings.heading: ZOENIX: Performance and Sustainability Redefined
settings.description: Made from recycled polyester, ZOENIX turns post-consumer plastic bottles into high-performance fabric for training and everyday movement.
settings.performance:
ZO-Dry wicks moisture away to keep you dry
ZO-Fresh helps keep odour in check
FluidMotion 4-way stretch supports agility and fit
settings.sustainability:
Reduces CO2 emissions compared to virgin polyester
Built from recycled materials using RPET
Supports circular material choices
settings.community: Made for high-intensity apparel that performs well in humid conditions while supporting a more responsible material story.

settings.name: ZOENIXLITE
settings.heading: ZOENIXLITE: Lightweight. Breathable. Sustainable.
settings.description: ZOENIXLITE blends recycled polyester, elastane and tuned structure to deliver breathability and flexibility where it matters.
settings.performance:
ZO-Dry moisture control
ZO-Vent mesh design for ventilation
FluidMotion stretch supports freedom in every movement
settings.sustainability:
Made with recycled polyester
Supports a circular material approach
Balances performance with environmental responsibility
settings.community: Built for comfort, performance and style while athletes give their best in every session.

settings.name: RPSTRNG
settings.heading: RPSTRNG: Engineered for Durability and Performance
settings.description: RPSTRNG is engineered to withstand rigorous training while keeping athletes cool, dry and comfortable.
settings.performance:
Reinforced grid weave resists tearing
ZO-Dry wicks sweat efficiently
ZO-Vent and FluidMotion support comfort and freedom
ZO-Fresh keeps gear feeling clean
settings.sustainability:
Built from regenerated nylon
Supports lower-impact material choices
Designed for durability and longer wear
settings.community: Made for athletes who train hard and need gear that endures intense sessions.

settings.name: AURAFORM
settings.heading: AURAFORM: Elite Comfort. Maximum Endurance.
settings.description: AuraForm is a nylon and elastane performance fabric developed for strategic support, flexibility and a sculpted fit.
settings.performance:
FluidMotion supports unrestricted movement
Zenith Tech helps maintain fabric shape wear after wear
ZO-Dry keeps you cool and dry
ZO-Fresh helps neutralise odour
settings.sustainability:
Built from regenerated nylon
Supports circular material choices
Designed for lasting shape and repeated wear
settings.community: A balance of compression and comfort for athletes who want to feel supported, confident and unstoppable.

settings.name: NYCURV
settings.heading: NYCURV: Engineered for Unwavering Support and Comfort
settings.description: NyCurv is a high-denier nylon and elastane blend designed for fit, shape retention and confident movement.
settings.performance:
Premium shape retention and enhanced compression
FluidMotion 4-way stretch for full range of motion
ZO-Dry moisture-wicking keeps you cool and dry
ZO-Fresh supports long-lasting freshness
settings.sustainability:
Built from regenerated nylon
Designed for durability and long wear
Supports reduced-waste performance apparel
settings.community: Made for athletes who demand confidence, support and power wherever they train or compete.

settings.name: NYX
settings.heading: NYX: Engineered for High-Intensity Training
settings.description: NyX delivers targeted support and shape retention during intense workouts without compromising comfort.
settings.performance:
NyCurv and elastane blend for firm flexible compression
FluidMotion allows full range of motion
ZO-Dry and ZO-Fresh support comfort and hygiene
Holds shape wash after wash
settings.sustainability:
Built from regenerated nylon
Designed for repeated wear
Supports more responsible training gear
settings.community: High-performance compression that works as hard as you do, with ventilation zones and strategic structure.

settings.name: NYXLITE
settings.heading: NYXLITE: Cooling. Compressive. Ready for the Outdoors.
settings.description: NyXlite offers breathable support and structure for hot, humid and high-effort training environments.
settings.performance:
Lightweight blend of NyCurv and elastane
Strategic compression zones support muscle effort
ZO-Dry and ZO-Fresh keep you dry and fresh
Perforated jacquard design enhances breathability
settings.sustainability:
Built from regenerated nylon
Designed for outdoor durability
Supports responsible high-performance construction
settings.community: Designed for outdoor athletes training in real conditions with comfort, support and breathability.
